title: [CODEREVIEW-PASS2] coap_status.c: time_fields and dodag_fields still uint8_t - inconsistency after map_count fix
description: coap_status.c:296,329 - Local uint8_t vars for sub-map counts not updated. Should be uint16_t + bounds for consistency with top-level fix. CCP-17 style. Tag: codereview
